notes:
- License system: trial (14 days full access), free (watermark on exports), Pro (full access)
- License activation modal: email-first flow — user must enter email before license key
- Automatic personal templates folder creation on first launch
- License section in Settings: plan status, activation/deactivation button
- Trial/free banner in the app header with days-remaining indicator
- Export PDF and HTML now correctly injects watermark in free mode
- Import personal templates feature now requires Pro license
- DONNÉES ribbon tab hidden in free mode
- RSA-signed license keys (FMRT-... format), verified locally with public key
- 4-anchor install date system (config, Temp file, AppData, Registry) with XOR obfuscation
- Clock tamper detection to prevent trial extension
- Cloudflare Worker for activation counting (max 5 machines per license)
- Periodic online license check every 14 days (revocation support)
- Disposable email domain blocklist (355 domains) in license manager
- Email validation in generate-license.js and server.js
